text.fullText: TRUCKERS AS WE KNOW IT ARE STARVING. COMPANIES SHOULD BE HELD RESPONSIBLE TO PAY CARRIERS FAIR RATES AND BROKERS SHOULD NOT BE MAKING 1000 PLUS ON A LOAD OFF THE BACK OF TRUCKERS. THERE HAS TO BE TRANSPARENCY AND ACCOUNTABILITY WITHOUT RETALALIATIION. OTHERWISE ALL TRUCKS IN US SHOULD STOP HAULING EVERYTHING UNTIL WE ARE HEARD ACKNOWLEDGED AND PAID JUST AS AIRLINES PORT WORKERS AND PUBLIC TRANSIT WORKERS DO. I AM WILLING TO STOP  MOVING UNTIL THIS HAPPENS. WE SHOULD GO TO DC AND DO A STOPPAGE AND DEMAND THIS NOW!
